eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Dolores, CO; at 7:58 PM on JUN 27, 2026 Effective until 8:58 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Evacuate NOW from Glade Ranch Subdivision. Emergency Shelter at Pleasantview Firehouse if needed. Dolores/Norwood to Dolores Evacuation Route Evacuate NOW from Glade Ranch Subdivision. Emergency Shelter at Pleasantview Firehouse if needed. Dolores/Norwood to Dolores Evacuation Route
